3.1: ti oun to perisson tou ioudaiou h tiv h wfeleia thv peritomhv
3.2: polu kata panta tropon prwton men gar oti episteuyhsan ta logia tou yeou
3.3: ti gar ei hpisthsan tinev mh h apistia autwn thn pistin tou yeou katarghsei
3.4: mh genoito ginesyw de o yeov alhyhv pav de anyrwpov qeusthv kaywv gegraptai opwv an dikaiwyhv en toiv logoiv sou kai nikhshv en tw krinesyai se
3.5: ei de h adikia hmwn yeou dikaiosunhn sunisthsin ti eroumen mh adikov o yeov o epiferwn thn orghn kata anyrwpon legw
3.6: mh genoito epei pwv krinei o yeov ton kosmon
3.7: ei gar h alhyeia tou yeou en tw emw qeusmati eperisseusen eiv thn doxan autou ti eti kagw wv amartwlov krinomai
3.8: kai mh kaywv blasfhmoumeya kai kaywv fasin tinev hmav legein oti poihswmen ta kaka ina elyh ta agaya wn to krima endikon estin
3.9: ti oun proecomeya ou pantwv prohtiasameya gar ioudaiouv te kai ellhnav pantav uf amartian einai
3.10: kaywv gegraptai oti ouk estin dikaiov oude eiv
3.11: ouk estin o suniwn ouk estin o ekzhtwn ton yeon
3.12: pantev exeklinan ama hcreiwyhsan ouk estin poiwn crhstothta ouk estin ewv enov
3.13: tafov anewgmenov o larugx autwn taiv glwssaiv autwn edoliousan iov aspidwn upo ta ceilh autwn
3.14: wn to stoma arav kai pikriav gemei
3.15: oxeiv oi podev autwn ekceai aima
3.16: suntrimma kai talaipwria en taiv odoiv autwn
3.18: ouk estin fobov yeou apenanti twn ofyalmwn autwn
3.19: oidamen de oti osa o nomov legei toiv en tw nomw lalei ina pan stoma fragh kai upodikov genhtai pav o kosmov tw yew
3.20: dioti ex ergwn nomou ou dikaiwyhsetai pasa sarx enwpion autou dia gar nomou epignwsiv amartiav
3.21: nuni de cwriv nomou dikaiosunh yeou pefanerwtai marturoumenh upo tou nomou kai twn profhtwn
3.22: dikaiosunh de yeou dia pistewv ihsou cristou eiv pantav kai epi pantav touv pisteuontav ou gar estin diastolh
3.23: pantev gar hmarton kai usterountai thv doxhv tou yeou
3.24: dikaioumenoi dwrean th autou cariti dia thv apolutrwsewv thv en cristw ihsou
3.25: on proeyeto o yeov ilasthrion dia thv pistewv en tw autou aimati eiv endeixin thv dikaiosunhv autou dia thn paresin twn progegonotwn amarthmatwn
3.26: en th anoch tou yeou prov endeixin thv dikaiosunhv autou en tw nun kairw eiv to einai auton dikaion kai dikaiounta ton ek pistewv ihsou
3.27: pou oun h kauchsiv exekleisyh dia poiou nomou twn ergwn ouci alla dia nomou pistewv
3.28: logizomeya oun pistei dikaiousyai anyrwpon cwriv ergwn nomou
3.29: h ioudaiwn o yeov monon ouci de kai eynwn nai kai eynwn
3.30: epeiper eiv o yeov ov dikaiwsei peritomhn ek pistewv kai akrobustian dia thv pistewv
3.31: nomon oun katargoumen dia thv pistewv mh genoito alla nomon istwmen
